_meta.used_by: S-0-3 foundation for S-1 profile-guided + S-2 cost model + S-4 test-gen
_meta.status: initial skeleton — grows as linter/compiler passes wire up.

naming_convention.form: single lowercase English word (verb or adjective)
process: 1. ls self/attrs/*.hexa — scan existing names, forbid semantic overlap
2. check shared/rules/hexa-lang.json HX12 — attr creation checklist
4. user picks → wire SSOT: self/attrs/<name>.hexa + _registry.hexa (3 sites) + this catalog

pure.purpose: fn has no side effects; same inputs → same output
pure.auto_test: random-input determinism check (same args 10x → same result)
pure.enforcement: parser rejects IO builtins inside @pure body (partially done)

memoize.cost_rule: net win when call_count > 1 AND fn_time > memo_lookup_time (~50ns)
memoize.detect_candidate: runtime profile: repeated args pattern → suggest

lazy.cost_rule: net win when consumer has <100% hit rate

hot.purpose: mark fn as performance-critical — JIT/codegen prioritizes
hot.auto_test: profile: top-10% self-time → valid; else → 오명

parallel.purpose: for-loop body has no cross-iter dependency → parallelizable
parallel.auto_test: serial vs parallel result equality check

fuse.purpose: merge back-to-back ops (matmul+add, etc.) into single kernel
fuse.detect_candidate: AST sequence of independent ops on same tensor

specialize.purpose: generate per-type copies (monomorphization) for hot call sites
specialize.cost_rule: call_count >= 3 distinct types; skip if 1 dominant type

retry.purpose: retry on failure up to N times (default 3)

fallback.purpose: catch errors, return void on failure

track.purpose: record all calls for later analysis

deprecated.purpose: warn on call — API planned for removal

optimize.purpose: AST rewrite hint — e.g. bubble→merge, linear→binary

approx.purpose: fast math — allow fp reassociation, lower-precision intrinsics

profile.purpose: emit timing events — feeds S-1 runtime feedback

quantize.purpose: int8/int4 weight representation — error floor per memory quantization_error_floor.md

test.purpose: fn 을 테스트로 표시 — `hexa test <file>` 러너가 수집·실행
test.cost_rule: 테스트당 1개 독립 stage0 프로세스 spawn (assert 격리)
test.side_effect: exit code 0 = PASS, non-zero = FAIL, @skip 조합 = skip
test.combos: @test @skip fn t_pending() — 러너가 skip 으로 리포트

dispatch.purpose: independent task MUST be fanned out as parallel background subagent — main conversation never blocks
dispatch.cost_rule: task has no dep on current context AND (runs > 30s OR spans > 3 queries OR produces > 2KB raw output)
dispatch.side_effect: spawns Agent tool call; main context unblocked
dispatch.requires: Agent tool (subagent_type=general-purpose|Explore|Plan) + run_in_background=true for long tasks
dispatch.added_2026_04_18: user directive — 새 세션 자동 인지 (repo-native, hook/memory 금지)

ossify.purpose: symbol declared fully converged — any modification is a rule violation
ossify.cost_rule: body or signature hash change = error; removal = error
ossify.side_effect: freezes semantics — downstream code may rely on exact behavior
ossify.auto_test: hash pin — compute body+signature hash on first seal, compare on every build
ossify.added_2026_04_18: 수렴 완료 선언 — CLAUDE.md convergence state=ossified 어휘와 정렬

refuse.purpose: Mac 에서 직접 실행 refuse — 원격 dispatch 강제 (panic 재발 방지)
refuse.cost_rule: runtime 진입 시 uname=Darwin → exit(77); 우회는 HEXA_MAC_OK=1
refuse.side_effect: Mac 로컬 실행 거부, ubu/hetzner dispatch 강제
refuse.rule_ref: AG6 Mac Compute Zero + HX8 stage0 rebuild policy
refuse.added_2026_04_18: Mac panic 재발 방지 안전장치 (rename from mac_forbid — _naming 규칙)

heavy.purpose: heavy compute 선언 — RSS/time budget 예측 가능하게 힌트
heavy.cost_rule: RSS > 1GB OR wall > 30s 예상 시 부착 — Mac 로컬 실행 비권장
heavy.side_effect: advisory only — refuse 동작 없음 (@refuse 조합 권장)
heavy.added_2026_04_18: @refuse 와 쌍 RSS/time budget 마커 (rename from heavy_compute — _naming 규칙)

watchdog.purpose: runtime RSS/time cap — 임계 초과 시 SIGKILL (Mac panic 재발 방지)
watchdog.cost_rule: 함수 진입 시 parent fork → ps -o rss 500ms 폴링 + kill -KILL on breach
watchdog.added_2026_04_18: Mac panic 재발 방지 runtime attr 도입

monitor.purpose: 함수 단위 RSS/time 메트릭 jsonl 수집 — 성능 리그레션 감지 입력

nonblock.purpose: tool-dispatch 단위 sync 블로킹 raw 차단 — PreToolUse hook 자동 생성
nonblock.cost_rule: 대상 tool 호출 직전 JSON 파싱 → run_in_background!=true 면 deny

args.tokens: string list — .hexa-attrs 에 `nonblock = Bash, Agent, Task` 형식. 기본값: Bash|Agent|Task

nonblock.pairs_with: forbid (파일 Write/Edit 차단 vs tool-dispatch runtime 차단)
nonblock.rule_ref: fix.txt 2026-04-18 76× interrupt — soft rule → raw gate 전환
nonblock.added_2026_04_18: hexa-lang 레벨 tool-dispatch 블로킹 raw 차단 SSOT

silentexit.purpose: fn 이 의도적으로 exit() 호출하되 exit code 전파 없음을 선언 (stdout-prefix 프로토콜)
silentexit.cost_rule: .hexa-attrs warn=[unannotated-exit] 활성 시 annotation 부재 fn 을 warn
silentexit.side_effect: declarative marker — PR-3 exit() propagate 후 enforcement 로 승격 예정
silentexit.rule_ref: PR-1 2026-04-19 — nexus stdout-prefix 워크어라운드 (exec_validated) first-class 승격
silentexit.added_2026_04_19: stage0 exit() 미전파 기술 부채 표면화 → migration helper scripts/migrate_silent_exit.hexa 동반

categories.execution: test/bench runner 가 자동 수집·실행하는 fn 마커
categories.platform: OS/hardware 환경 제약 — runtime refuse or advisory
categories.runtime: runtime 자원 감시 — RSS/time cap (watchdog), 메트릭 수집 (monitor)

next_work: S-0: wire enforcement fields into ai_native_lint.hexa
S-1: profile category attrs feed runtime dump
S-2: performance category attrs + cost_rule feed cost model
S-3: rewrite category attrs enable semantic IR passes
S-4: auto_test field generates property tests
